aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Sky Air LLC due to decent content and schema, but improvements in conversational tone and authority signals are needed for higher visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to leverage existing FAQ content.
Expand on 'Community Commitment' to include specific local partnerships or initiatives.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies due to third-party changes.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for explaining common HVAC maintenance or installation processes.
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed service-area information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services or specific local promotions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding on community initiatives.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and authority signals.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current content lacks the conversational tone and detailed schema to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance schema markup, create conversational content, and amplify authority signals to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Potential 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Sky Air: Boost Your AI Visibility & Lead Generation Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss our tailored AEO strategy for Sky Air LLC.
